sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO I_INFORMATION_T (infoid,infooperate,infotitle,infocontent,submitunit,submitunitid, otherunitids,otherunit,infosource,infotype,infostate,urgentflag,isclear, pointaddress1,pointaddress2,pointaddress3,reviewer,issuer,attachments,gatherid,annotationid, departmentid,validflag,addoperator,addtime) VALUES ($infoid$,$infooperate$,'$infotitle$','$infocontent$','$submitunit$',$submitunitid$, '$otherunitids$','$otherunit$','$infosource$','$infotype$','$infostate$','$urgentflag$','$isclear$', '$pointaddress1$','$pointaddress2$','$pointaddress3$','$reviewer$','$issuer$','$attachments$',$gatherid$,$annotationid$, $departmentid$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM I_INFORMATION_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
(infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
departmentid = $departmentid$
infostate = '$infostate$'
urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
infosource = '$infosource$'
infotype = '$infotype$'
gatherid = $gatherid$
annotationid = $annotationid$
addtime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= addtime

SELECT a.*,d.departname as departname,CONCAT(f.addtime,' ',f.content) as yuantoupizhu FROM I_INFORMATION_T a LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on a.departmentid = d.id left join i_information_annotation_t f on a.annotationid = f.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
(a.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(a.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
a.departmentid = $departmentid$
a.infostate = '$infostate$'
a.urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
a.infosource = '$infosource$'
a.infotype = '$infotype$'
a.gatherid = $gatherid$
a.annotationid = $annotationid$
a.addtime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= a.addtime
order by a.id desc
SELECT a.*,d.departname as departname FROM I_INFORMATION_T a left join sys_department_t d on a.departmentid = d.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0 AND a.id = $id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE I_INFORMATION_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_T SET annotationid = $annotationid$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
select departname,count(B.id) as value from (select * from sys_department_t where validflag>0 and departtype=$departtype$)A left join (SELECT a.*,departmentid FROM I_INFORMATION_SEND_T a LEFT JOIN I_INFORMATION_T b on a.informationid = b.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
a.validflag >= $validflag$ )B on B.departmentid = A.id GROUP BY A.departname ORDER BY A.id
